data.name: Femdom Girlfriend 6: Selene, the Mega-Bitch
data.detailed_description:
As usual in your daily life with Sophie, your hyper-sadistic girlfriend, she treats you like her pet and bullies you to her heart's content, then sends you off to her best friend, Selene, the spoiled brat mega-bitch, so that she can torment you for her own sadistic pleasure too, and today, Selene, the spoiled brat mega-bitch, is in a gleefully sadistic mood and shows you no mercy.

Experience a day with Sophie and Selene, 2 of your sexy, big-breasted, sadistic bullies who make your inner masochist come out.

  • ~1.5K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • 21 Unique character images

  • 23 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
